subcodes.first_line: God willing, in these sovereign days thou shalt discover the fragrance of the Garment, turn thy face toward the sanctuary of holiness, and unto that which God hath willed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله در این سید ایام عرف قمیص را بیابی و بشطر تقدیس توجه نمائی و بما اراد الله
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @knowledge; recognition of God, @Muhammad; Islam, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
